prompt: A vast muddy field under heavy overcast sky, with thick dark smoke rising from the far horizon. Muted earth tones — brown, grey-green, ash. The smoke column dominates the upper frame, the empty field the lower. Harsh, unflattering flat daylight. No people visible — just the scale of devastation suggested by smoke and mud. Bleak, monumental, 16:9, photorealistic.
negative_prompt: text, letters, typography, logo, watermark, collage, split screen, multi-panel, low detail, cluttered composition, extra objects, cartoon, illustration, CGI look, unreadable signage, oversharpening

settings.depth_of_field: controlled depth of field for thumbnail readability
settings.quality: high detail, bold shapes, small-size readability
